movie.actors: Tom Berenger, Raymond Cruz, William Forsythe, Luis Guzmán
movie.plot: After a botched mission in Cuba, professional mercenary Shale and his crew Joey Six, Hollan, Rem, and Wellman head home to Miami, Florida, where Shale is reunited with his fiance Jane ...
movie.title: The Substitute
movie.writer: Roy Frumkes, Rocco Simonelli, Alan Ormsby
